content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs (new helpers infer_workstream_order, validate_dependency_graph, summarize_bundle; expanded render_plan_md) and the enhanced REQUIREMENTS_MILESTONE_BUNDLE_DEFAULT template. Cycle detection (DFS with three-color states), Kahn's topological sort, and canonicalization integration are all correct. No panic paths (checked_div guards against zero acceptance criteria; .expect() sites only reached after successful canonicalize_bundle). Tests pass (39 bundle, 1015 lib, 801 unit). No false positives in contains_deferred_note against existing 'Follow-up workstream' description. No correctness, safety, or maintainability issues worth flagging.

## Amendments

None.
